rounding_rule: Percentages below 1 are shown to two decimals; percentages at or above 1 are shown to one decimal.

stages.label: Integrated AI evidence space
stages.filter: AI source collections; non-empty standardized title; deduplication within document type and analytical category using patent application ID, DOI, source ID, URL, then title-year-institution fallback.

stages.label: Integrated AI-risk evidence view
stages.filter: Curated and integrated AI-risk academic, policy, patent, benchmark, and verified top-200 sources; record-type filtering; non-empty standardized title; within-type/category deduplication.

stages.label: Canonical global L4 registry
stages.filter: Canonical source crosswalk; permanent RAI4 ID allocation; exact normalized label-and-core-definition duplicate removal only; inclusion of all 182 locked Physical AI cards. One retired ID remains mapped to its canonical card.

stages.unit: L4 risk card with non-null policy L3
stages.label: Assigned to one of 50 L3 nodes
stages.filter: Locked Physical placement, Stage 1 exact consensus, Stage 2 hierarchy-blind proposal, or Stage 3 forced top-1 placement. All cards receive an L3; after two independent expert reviews, 83 cards retain a HOLD marker and one consensus label amendment is applied.

lineage_warning: The transition from evidence records to L4 cards changes the unit of analysis. The 82,971 records are an evidence view, not a one-to-one parent table from which every L4 card was mechanically generated.
